docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
STIPULATION TO USE JUDGE PRO TEM AND ORDER FILED BY WOULLARD, CHARLENE BURRELL-SCOTT, RONI

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF APR-03-2014 - SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT REVERSED. JUDGE PRO TEM ELLIOTT MYLES, CLERK JEAN KONG, D525, NOT REPORTED. THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF 01/28/2014. EXHIBITS WILL BE DESTROYED PURSUANT TO CCP 1952.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT BURRELL-SCOTT, RONI RECOVER FROM APPELLANT WOULLARD, CHARLENE $417.00 PRINCIPAL, $25.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $442.00, NO SIDE PRODUCED EVIDENCE OF THE VALUE OF THE APARTMENT CONTENTS, WHICH WERE SEPERATE PROPERTY AND PROPERTY OWED BY A ROOMMATE. THE AWARD REPRESENTS 1/3 OF THE ESTIMATED SEPARATE PROPERTY, NOT INCLUDING ROOMMATES' PROPERTY. PROB C6401(C)(3); THE JUDGMENT ON APPEAL IS FINAL AND REPLACES THE SMALL CLAIMS JUDGMENT OF 1/28/2014. EXHIBITS ARE ORDERED RETURNED PURSUANT TO CCP1952. PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2014 ORDERED DESTROYED

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF BURRELL-SCOTT, RONI ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE ELAN C. LAMBERT. FILED BY BURRELL-SCOTT, RONI WOULLARD, CHARLENE

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT WOULLARD, CHARLENE ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
TRANSMITTAL RECEIPT FILED (DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS FROM SMALL CLAIMS DIVISION)

THE ORDER OF EXAMINATION IS DISCHARGED AS TO DEFENDANT, THE JUDGMENT IS SATISFIED. " JUDGMENT DEBTOR HANDED JUDGMENT CREDITOR A MONEY ORDER FOR $442.00 WHICH IS THE FULL PAYMENT AMOUNT OF JUDGMENT", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVED SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-28-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-28-2014 BY JUDGE PRO TEM ELAN C. LAMBERT. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ELAN C. LAMBERT. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR
Off Calendar Sep-29-2014 Discharged

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Apr-03-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:58am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, Clerk Jean Kong, D525, Not reported.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal.
Appellant, Charlene Woullard, appears in pro per with witnesses Jonniccka Scott & Trenell Perryman; Respondent, Roni burrell-Scott, appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Myles.

EXHR (A) Probate Code (respondent took handwritten application back)
EXHR (B) Inventory-value (list of husband's items)
EXHA (1) pictures, etc (Group exhibits)

11:32am
Matter is submitted. Newly marked evidence is retained.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Jan-28-2014 Judgment Entered
